entry.title: New IDC HSHQDC14D00006 awarded to THE MITRE CORPORATION for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Task order performance is permited to run no later than six (6) months past the end date of the Contract Ordering Period.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

entry.title: IDC HSHQDC14D00006 (P00001) awarded to THE MITRE CORPORATION, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Task order performance is permited to run no later than six (6) months past the end date of the Contract Ordering Period.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:majorProgramCode: HOMELAND SECURITY SYSTEMS ENGINEERING AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IGF::CL::IGF THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION TO U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY INDEFINITE-DELIVERY, INDEFINITE-QUANTITY CONTRACT PIID HSHQDC-14-D-00006 IS TO INCORPORATE A DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE CONTRACT SECURITY CLASSIFICATION SPECIFICATION (DD FORM 254), AND REVISE UNIFORM CONTRACT FORMAT SECTION I.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: R&D- OTHER RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT (ENGINEERING DEVELOPMENT)

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT IN THE PHYSICAL, ENGINEERING, AND LIFE SCIENCES (EXCEPT BIOTECHNOLOGY)

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
